name: Prison MMPI Scores
description: MMPI psychopathic deviate scores before and after treatment for 14 inmates.
studyDescription: A study of 14 prison inmates who completed the MMPI (Minnesota Multiphasic Personality Inventory) psychopathic deviate scale before and after a treatment program. Each inmate served as their own control in this paired design.

variableDescriptions.pre_treatment: MMPI psychopathic deviate scale score measured before treatment
variableDescriptions.post_treatment: MMPI psychopathic deviate scale score measured after treatment

sourceDetail: OpenIntro. Data from a study of psychological treatment effects on inmates using the MMPI psychopathic deviate subscale.

context.nullClaim: no change in MMPI scores after treatment

inferenceContexts.parameter: the population mean difference in MMPI scores (pre − post)
inferenceContexts.claim: MMPI psychopathic deviate scores decrease after treatment
